message:
test(workflows): add 60 unit tests for step_results and descriptors modules

step_results.rs (31 tests):
- StepResult constructors and predicates (Continue, Done, Retry, Abort,
  WaitFor, SendText, JumpTo)
- Serde roundtrip for all StepResult variants
- TextMatch constructors, description(), to_wait_matcher() (valid/invalid regex)
- WaitCondition constructors (pattern, pane_idle, stable_tail, text_match,
  sleep, external) and pane_id() accessors
- Serde roundtrip for all WaitCondition variants

descriptors.rs (29 tests):
- YAML and TOML parsing of minimal and complex descriptors
- All 12 validation error cases (wrong schema version, empty steps, too many
  steps, duplicate IDs, empty ID, sleep too long, wait timeout too long,
  send_text too long, invalid regex, loop too many iterations, loop empty
  body, matcher too long)
- DescriptorFailureHandler interpolation (${failed_step})
- DescriptorMatcher to_text_match conversion
- Conditional and Loop compilation
- Filesystem loading (yaml+toml, nonexistent dir, skip invalid)
- ControlKey, FailureHandler, WorkflowDescriptor serde roundtrips

Also fixes clippy derivable-impl warning in cost_tracker.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
